goal: Close the unfinished A1 branch from v2 to a final PROMOTE/REJECT verdict, and only if A1 fails open exactly one next low-friction candidate through the full acceptance chain.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable: never retune its hours, days, thresholds, or execution parameters
Any candidate must pass strict-additive, permissive-integration, ownership, and cannibalization proof before promotion
No medium-friction wave B until both low-friction branches (A1 + one of A2/A3) are fully closed with no promoted candidate
Only one active low-friction branch may be investigated at a time
Maximum 3-4 features per prototype; maximum 2-3 prototypes per branch
If a candidate loses positivity after removing its strongest historical segment, it is not mainline-quality

slices.title: Обязательная интеграция A1 в двух режимах
slices.hypothesis: Close the main v2 gap by proving whether A1 is truly additive through both strict-additive and permissive integration against the unchanged base.
slices.objective: Close the main v2 gap by proving whether A1 is truly additive through both strict-additive and permissive integration against the unchanged base.
success_criteria: Complete integration picture for A1 in both modes
Delta metrics against base computed for PnL, trades, PF, DD, and weak-quarter repair
evidence_requirements: Complete integration picture for A1 in both modes
Delta metrics against base computed for PnL, trades, PF, DD, and weak-quarter repair

slices.title: Ownership, cannibalization и proof of new entries для A1
slices.hypothesis: Prove the nature of A1's delta to the base by measuring overlap, truly new trades, replaced base trades, and coverage expansion.
slices.objective: Prove the nature of A1's delta to the base by measuring overlap, truly new trades, replaced base trades, and coverage expansion.
success_criteria: Ownership and cannibalization metrics are recorded
Enough evidence exists for a final PROMOTE / WATCHLIST / REJECT decision on A1
evidence_requirements: Ownership and cannibalization metrics are recorded
Enough evidence exists for a final PROMOTE / WATCHLIST / REJECT decision on A1

slices.title: Финальное решение по A1
slices.hypothesis: Close A1 definitively with one of three verdicts: PROMOTE, WATCHLIST SPECIALIST, or REJECT.
slices.objective: Close A1 definitively with one of three verdicts: PROMOTE, WATCHLIST SPECIALIST, or REJECT.
success_criteria: A1 is definitively closed with a recorded verdict and rationale
evidence_requirements: A1 is definitively closed with a recorded verdict and rationale
